item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: My first time reading over the revised version. I think the 1921 connection works better implicit rather than explicit, and the phrase "thaumaturgical treacle" is a gem.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Damn. Loved the story this told, and that the document says that the creator can't be trusted, raising the question to leave us with. Take a solid upvote from me, my friend. +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Awww. I actually felt bad for the little monsters. +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
The article is much better in my opinion, but there are minor tone issues that I'd have to address

SCP-3077's primary anomalous property is that it is animate,

you could simply write it as "SCP-3077 is animate,"….

and control them in a jerky, puppet-like manner.

I feel this is, hmm, more like "stiff" manner? Eh this one's not really that bad,you could probably left it.

However, she does not appear to possess any ability to control either

More like, "However, PoI-3077-1 has not demonstrated ability to control these instances" or something?

Again, these advice are completely optional and the skip is good enough as is. Best of luck.

item.title: Re: Made with the Blessing of PeppersGhost
item.content:encoded:
I openly admit I'm better at writing tales. SCPs are hard, for me at least, because they're such an odd beast. They have to be believable as clinical documents but still be interesting and unique and avoid all the cliches. If there is a story it has to be presented in a very specific fashion to keep with the Foundation's premise.

I just wrote this one to tie in with my tale series, and I have no immediate plans to write another one. This was a lot of work for a relatively little payoff.

Trust me, I'm going to stick with tales as much as possible.

item.title: Re: Made with the Blessing of PeppersGhost
item.content:encoded: Reference? Half the article is 1921, but with some different traits and less well-written - with a story stapled to the end. This probably would have been better as a Tale.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Oh fuck I completely forgot about this

Well, I've finished reading this now, and +1'ed.

item.title: Re: Made with the Blessing of PeppersGhost
Re: Made with the Blessing of PeppersGhost
Re: Made with the Blessing of PeppersGhost
item.content:encoded: please remove the tags, the tag team will add tags to your posts for you later.

item.title: Rewrite - No more Cotton Candy
item.content:encoded:
So I have rewritten this SCP to remove any and all references to SCP-1921.

If that was your primary reason for downvoting then I kindly request you review the SCP in its current form and possibly reconsider.

Thank you, and have a disquieting day.
